description: Defines the blocker typing contract governing dependency constraints in the construction pipeline. Blockers represent conditions that prevent progress on a target entity until a blocking condition is resolved. Runtime must validate blocker records against this contract and must not define its own blocker classes.
fail_closed_rule: Any blocker record with an unrecognized blocker_class or resolution_state must be rejected. Runtime must not invent blocker classifications.

missing_detail_blocker.label: Missing Detail Blocker
missing_detail_blocker.description: A required construction detail is absent, blocking assembly completion or drawing issuance.

missing_submittal_blocker.label: Missing Submittal Blocker
missing_submittal_blocker.description: A required product submittal or shop drawing has not been received or approved.

incompatible_material_blocker.label: Incompatible Material Blocker
incompatible_material_blocker.description: Material incompatibility blocks assembly acceptance until substitution or engineering resolution.

unresolved_rfi_blocker.label: Unresolved RFI Blocker
unresolved_rfi_blocker.description: An RFI response is pending, blocking design resolution.

failed_qa_check_blocker.label: Failed QA Check Blocker
failed_qa_check_blocker.description: A QA constraint has failed, blocking artifact advancement.

scope_ownership_blocker.label: Scope Ownership Blocker
scope_ownership_blocker.description: Scope ownership is unassigned or disputed, blocking coordination.

interface_coordination_blocker.label: Interface Coordination Blocker
interface_coordination_blocker.description: Interface between assemblies requires multi-discipline coordination that has not occurred.

specification_conflict_blocker.label: Specification Conflict Blocker
specification_conflict_blocker.description: Conflicting specification requirements block material or method selection.

incomplete_drawing_blocker.label: Incomplete Drawing Blocker
incomplete_drawing_blocker.description: Drawing package is incomplete, blocking issuance.

field_condition_blocker.label: Field Condition Blocker
field_condition_blocker.description: A field condition differs from design assumptions, blocking construction.
